data.answer: The covenant test uses Adjusted EBITDA of 985.0, not the naive EBITDA before addbacks of 785.0, because the credit agreement permits certain addbacks (e.g., Device Strategy charges of 155 and Quality charges of 45) [DIGEST]. The resulting Leverage Ratio of 3.066x is below the §6.6A threshold of 3.75x, so there is no breach [DIGEST][10].
